title: AFL Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: AFL Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Warehouse Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
